title: Richly Lavished Irish Cream Cheese Stir-fry
description: A rich and creamy Irish dish featuring capers, deglazed with a touch of alcohol to enhance its romantic flavor profile.

ingredients.name: 6 oz (170g) Irish cream cheese
ingredients.amount: softened and cut into small pieces

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup dry vermouth or white wine
Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Season the tofu with salt and pepper.
Sauté the tofu until golden brown, about 5 minutes per side.
Add prawns to the pan; cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or just until pinked. Remove from pan and set aside.
In a separate saucepan, heat butter over medium-high heat. Add garlic and tarragon if using, sautéing for about 1 minute.
Pour in vermouth and scrape the bottom of the pan to deglaze, stirring continuously until most liquid evaporates, about 2 minutes.
Return prawns to the pan with tofu; pour over the sauce mixture. Gently stir in Irish cream cheese pieces.
Cook for an additional minute or two until cheese is melted and thoroughly incorporated into the sauce.
Season with salt and pepper according to taste. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
